lines.raw: English | 英语
Hurry up! | 快点！

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: How do you know Sam doesn't make the tea very often?
lines.chinese: 你怎么知道山姆不经常泡茶？
lines.raw: How do you know Sam doesn't make the tea very often? | 你怎么知道山姆不经常泡茶？

lines.english: Can you make the tea, Sam?
lines.raw: Can you make the tea, Sam? | 山姆，你会泡茶吗？

lines.english: Yes, of course I can, Penny.
lines.raw: Yes, of course I can, Penny. | 是的，我当然会，潘妮。

lines.english: Is there any water in this kettle?
lines.raw: Is there any water in this kettle? | 这个水壶里有水吗？
Yes, there is. | 是的，有水。
Where's the tea? | 茶在哪里？

lines.english: It's over there, behind the teapot.
lines.raw: It's over there, behind the teapot. | 它在那边，茶壶后面。
Can you see it? | 你能看到吗？

lines.english: I can see the teapot, but I can't see the tea.
lines.chinese: 我能看到茶壶，但我看不到茶。
lines.raw: I can see the teapot, but I can't see the tea. | 我能看到茶壶，但我看不到茶。
There it is! | 它在那儿！
It's in front of you! | 就在你面前！

lines.english: Ah yes, I can see it now.
lines.raw: Ah yes, I can see it now. | 啊，是的，我现在看到了。
Where are the cups? | 杯子在哪里？

lines.english: There are some in the cupboard.
lines.raw: There are some in the cupboard. | 橱柜里有一些。
Can you find them? | 你能找到它们吗？
Yes. Here they are. | 是的。它们在这里。
Hurry up, Sam! | 快点，山姆！
The kettle's boiling! | 水壶开了！
